


---
title: "Gapminder 2007"
format: dashboard

---

```{python}
import plotly.express as px
p = px.line (y=[1,2,3])
p
```

# page 1

## Row {height="30%"}

## column {width = " 33%"}

```{python}
p
```


### column {width="33%"}

```{python}
p
```

### column {width="33%"}

```{python}
p
```
## Row {height="60%"}

### column {width="50%"}

```{python}
p
```

### column {.tabset width="30%"}

#### tab 1

```{python}
p
```

#### tab 2

```{python}
p
```

# layouts

## Row {height="30%"}

## column {width = " 33%"}

```{python}
p
```


### column {width="33%"}

```{python}
p
```

### column {width="33%"}

```{python}
p
```
## Row {height="60%"}
### column {width="50%"}

```{python}
p
```
### column {width="30%"}

```{python}
p
```




# tabset

## Row {height="30%"}

## column {.tabset width = " 33%"}

#### Tab 1

```{python}
p
```

#### Tab 2
hello world


### column {width="33%"}

```{python}
p
```

### column {width="33%"}

```{python}
p
```
## Row {height="60%"}
### column {width="50%"}

```{python}
p
```
### column {width="30%"}

```{python}
p
```


# value boxes

```{python}
tips = px.data.tips()
tips
```

## {height="20%"}
::: {.valuebox title="big number" color="primary" icon="heart"} 
1
:::

::: {.valuebox title = "small number" color="secondary" icon="arrow-down"}
1
:::

::: {.valuebox title = "medium number" color="success" icon="bar-chart"}
1
:::


##

```{python}
p
```
